description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low stone or concrete wall, featuring a sloped, shingle-style roof with solar panels. The front facade has large rectangular windows, a double garage door, and a small porch with a white gate and flower boxes. The property includes a well-maintained lawn, several mature trees, and a paved driveway leading to the street. The rear of the house opens onto a patio area with outdoor seating, bordered by lush landscaping and flowering shrubs. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored horizontal siding, giving the house a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes geometric lines, open views, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern two-story house with a sloped shingle roof, large windows, and a double garage, surrounded by a landscaped yard and low stone wall. The exterior features light horizontal siding and a mix of greenery and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, large windows, and a small porch with flower boxes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lawn, minimal windows, and the boundary wall along the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor seating, and lush garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows, dense landscaping, and the street running alongside the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, small porch with flower boxes, white gate, and no overhang or columns.
